_notes: Abilities belonging to a character, triggered by dice roll results. Loaded from JSON at runtime. JSON holds the dice_cost (structured trigger condition) and display text; ALL effect behaviour (damage amounts, status infliction, scaling, dice-roll branching, conditionals) is implemented in code, keyed by ability 'id'. The 'description' field is display-only and must NOT be parsed by code. 'character_id' references character.id. Each ability carries an '_impl_note' for the developer implementing its handler.

_dice_cost_formats.symbols: { type: 'symbols', symbols: { <symbol>: <count>, ... } } — requires exactly/at-least these symbol counts.
_dice_cost_formats.symbols_min: { type: 'symbols_min', symbols: { <symbol>: <min> }, max: <int> } — minimum symbol count that triggers, scaling up to max. Scaling effect is in code.
_dice_cost_formats.pattern: { type: 'pattern', pattern: 'small_straight' | 'large_straight' } — a named dice pattern.
_dice_cost_formats.defensive_roll: { type: 'defensive_roll', dice_count: <int> } — a defensive ability that rolls N dice and reacts; not a symbol cost.

abilities.name: Higher Ground!
abilities.description: Inflict Targeted and Constrict onto the opponent. Increase Tactical Advantage stack limit by 1. Then gain max Tactical Advantage and deal 12 ultimate damage.
abilities._impl_note: Ultimate. Raises tactical_advantage stack_limit by 1 at runtime (base limit in status_effect.json is 5). Inflicts targeted + constrict, sets TA to current max, deals 12 undefendable.

abilities.name: Saber Strike
abilities.description: 3 Sabers: deal 4 damage. 4 Sabers: deal 5 damage. 5 Sabers: deal 6 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Single ability; damage scales with saber count (3->4, 4->5, 5->6).

abilities.name: Saber Strike II
abilities.description: 3 Sabers: deal 5 damage. 4 Sabers: deal 6 damage. 5 Sabers: deal 7 damage. If any 3 dice show an identical number (3-of-a-kind), inflict Constrict.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade of saber_strike. Damage scales (3->5, 4->6, 5->7). Extra: 3-of-a-kind identical values -> inflict constrict.

abilities.name: Carpet Bomb
abilities.description: Gain 1 Tactical Advantage. Deal 2 undefendable, collateral damage to 2 different chosen opponents.
abilities._impl_note: Gain 1 TA; 2 undefendable collateral dmg to two distinct targets.

abilities.name: Carpet Bomb II
abilities.description: Gain 2 Tactical Advantage. Deal 2 undefendable, collateral damage to 2 different chosen opponents.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade of carpet_bomb. Gain 2 TA (vs 1).

abilities.name: Strategize
abilities.description: Gain 3 Tactical Advantage. Draw 3 cards.
abilities._impl_note: Secondary ability of carpet_bomb_ii (relationship handled in code).

abilities.name: Profiteer
abilities.description: Gain 1 Tactical Advantage and roll 1 die: on Saber, deal 5 damage; on Flag, gain 4 Tactical Advantage; on Medal, draw 1 card then immediately begin an additional Offensive Roll Phase.
abilities._impl_note: Gain 1 TA, then 1-die branch (saber/flag/medal). Medal grants extra offensive roll phase.

abilities.name: Profiteer II
abilities.description: Gain 2 Tactical Advantage and roll 1 die: on Saber, deal 6 damage; on Flag, gain 3 Tactical Advantage; on Medal, draw 1 card then immediately begin an additional Offensive Roll Phase.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade of profiteer. Gain 2 TA; saber branch 6 dmg; flag branch 3 TA.

abilities.name: Strategic Approach
abilities.description: Inflict Constrict. Deal 7 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Inflict constrict; 7 dmg.

abilities.name: Strategic Approach II
abilities.description: Gain Tactical Advantage. Inflict Constrict. Deal 7 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade of strategic_approach. Adds TA gain.

abilities.name: Indirect Approach
abilities.description: Gain 2 Tactical Advantage. Deal 2 undefendable damage.
abilities._impl_note: Secondary ability of strategic_approach_ii (relationship handled in code).

abilities.name: Flank
abilities.description: Gain 1 Tactical Advantage. Deal 6 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Gain 1 TA; 6 dmg.

abilities.name: Flank II
abilities.description: Gain 2 Tactical Advantage. Deal 6 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade of flank. Gain 2 TA (vs 1).

abilities.name: Maneuver
abilities.description: Gain 5 Tactical Advantage. Deal 5 undefendable damage.
abilities._impl_note: Gain 5 TA; 5 undefendable dmg.

abilities.name: Maneuver II
abilities.description: Gain 5 Tactical Advantage. Inflict Constrict. Deal 5 undefendable damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade of maneuver. Adds constrict.

abilities.name: Reconnaissance
abilities.description: Gain 5 Tactical Advantage.
abilities._impl_note: Secondary ability of maneuver_ii (relationship handled in code).

abilities.name: Exploit
abilities.description: Gain 2 Tactical Advantage. Inflict Constrict. Deal 9 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Gain 2 TA; constrict; 9 dmg.

abilities.name: Exploit II
abilities.description: Gain 3 Tactical Advantage. Inflict Constrict. Deal 9 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade of exploit. Gain 3 TA (vs 2).

abilities.name: Interdiction
abilities.description: Draw 2 cards. Inflict Constrict on a chosen opponent.
abilities._impl_note: Secondary ability of exploit_ii (relationship handled in code).

abilities.name: Countermeasures
abilities.description: Every 2 Sabers: deal 1 damage to the attacker. Every 1 Flag: prevent 1 damage. Every 1 Medal: gain 1 Tactical Advantage.
abilities._impl_note: Defensive roll of 4 dice; tally per-symbol effects.

abilities.name: Countermeasures II
abilities.description: Every 2 Sabers: deal 1 undefendable damage to the attacker. Every 1 Flag: prevent 1 damage. Every 1 Medal: gain 1 Tactical Advantage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade. 5 dice; saber damage is now undefendable.

abilities.name: Countermeasures III
abilities.description: Every 2 Sabers: deal 2 undefendable damage to the attacker. Every 1 Flag: prevent 1 damage. Every 1 Medal: gain 1 Tactical Advantage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade. 5 dice; saber damage 2 undefendable per pair.

abilities.name: Jungle Fury
abilities.description: Gain Nyra's Bond, inflict 2 Bleed. Deal 12 undefendable damage.
abilities._impl_note: Ultimate. Gain nyras_bond; inflict 2 bleed; 12 undefendable.

abilities.name: Animalistic
abilities.description: 3 Spears: deal 3 damage. 4 Spears: deal 4 damage. 5 Spears: deal 5 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Damage scales with spear count (3->3, 4->4, 5->5).

abilities.name: Animalistic II
abilities.description: 3 Spears: deal 4 damage. 4 Spears: deal 5 damage. 5 Spears: deal 6 damage. On 4-of-a-kind, inflict Bleed.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade. Damage scales (3->4, 4->5, 5->6). Extra: 4-of-a-kind -> inflict bleed.

abilities.name: Savage
abilities.description: Deal 4 damage and roll 1 die: on Spear, add 1 damage; on Claw, add 2 damage; on Soul, gain Nyra's Bond; on Tooth, inflict 1 Bleed.
abilities._impl_note: 4 base dmg + 1-die branch.

abilities.name: Savage II
abilities.description: Deal 5 damage and roll 1 die: on Spear, add 1 damage; on Claw, add 2 damage; on Soul, gain Nyra's Bond; on Tooth, inflict 1 Bleed.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade of savage. 5 base dmg (vs 4).

abilities.name: Hunt
abilities.description: Inflict 1 Bleed. Deal 3 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Secondary ability of savage_ii (relationship handled in code).

abilities.name: Resuscitate
abilities.description: Gain Nyra's Bond. Heal Nyra 3 HP.
abilities._impl_note: Gain nyras_bond; heal companion (nyra) 3.

abilities.name: Resuscitate II
abilities.description: Gain Nyra's Bond. Heal Nyra 2 HP for every Soul rolled.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade. Heal scales with souls rolled (2 per soul).

abilities.name: Feral Instincts
abilities.description: Gain Nyra's Bond. Deal 2 undefendable damage.
abilities._impl_note: Gain nyras_bond; 2 undefendable.

abilities.name: Feral Instincts II
abilities.description: Gain Nyra's Bond. Deal 3 undefendable damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade. 3 undefendable (vs 2).

abilities.name: Swipe
abilities.description: Inflict Bleed on up to 3 chosen opponents.
abilities._impl_note: Secondary ability of feral_instincts_ii (relationship handled in code).

abilities.name: Onslaught
abilities.description: Inflict 1 Bleed. Deal 4 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Variation of the Onslaught ability (small straight cost). Same ability as onslaught_large_straight, different dice cost — split into two rows because each has a distinct dice_cost (see _notes, option B).

abilities.name: Onslaught
abilities.description: Inflict 2 Bleed. Deal 7 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Variation of the Onslaught ability (large straight cost). Same ability as onslaught_small_straight, different dice cost. Tagged 'Onslaught Secondary' in source.

abilities.name: Onslaught II
abilities.description: Inflict 1 Bleed. Deal 5 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade variation (small straight). Pairs with onslaught_ii_large_straight.

abilities.name: Onslaught II
abilities.description: Inflict 2 Bleed. Deal 8 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade variation (large straight). Tagged 'Onslaught II Secondary' in source.

abilities.name: Feral
abilities.description: Heal Nyra 1 HP. Deal 5 undefendable damage.
abilities._impl_note: Heal nyra 1; 5 undefendable.

abilities.name: Feral II
abilities.description: Heal Nyra 1 HP. Deal 6 undefendable damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade. 6 undefendable (vs 5).

abilities.name: Ferocious
abilities.description: Heal Nyra 1 HP. Inflict 2 Bleed on a chosen opponent.
abilities._impl_note: Secondary ability of feral_ii (relationship handled in code).

abilities.name: Predatory Advance
abilities.description: Heal Nyra 1 HP. Deal 5 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Heal nyra 1; 5 dmg.

abilities.name: Predatory Advance II
abilities.description: Heal Nyra 1 HP. Deal 6 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade. 6 dmg (vs 5).

abilities.name: Jugular
abilities.description: Inflict 2 Bleed.
abilities._impl_note: Secondary ability of predatory_advance_ii (relationship handled in code).

abilities.name: Maternal Bond
abilities.description: On Spear: deal 1 damage. For every Soul: heal Nyra 1 HP. If Nyra is active, on Claw: deal 2 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Defensive roll of 3 dice; claw branch only if nyra active.

abilities.name: Maternal Bond II
abilities.description: On Spear: deal 1 damage. For every Soul: heal Nyra 1 HP. If Nyra is active, on Claw: deal 2 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade. 4 dice.

abilities.name: Maternal Bond III
abilities.description: For every Spear or Tooth: deal 1 damage. For every Soul: heal Nyra 1 HP. If Nyra is active, on Claw: deal 2 damage.
abilities._impl_note: Upgrade. 4 dice; spear OR tooth now deals damage.
